scene_description: The road has multiple lanes with cars driving on it, and there are trees and streetlights along the sides.

A two-lane urban road with a pedestrian sidewalk on the left, lined with shops and restaurants including McDonald's. The road has a few vehicles, including a black SUV and a red car. Pedestrians are walking on the sidewalk.
A city street with buildings, bare trees, parked cars, a green metal fence, a brick wall, people walking and cycling, and a road marked with 'SCHOOL' in yellow paint.
The image shows a suburban street with cars parked along both sides, featuring houses with brick exteriors and tiled roofs, and a blue sky with white clouds above.
A green building with multiple windows stands behind a wooden fence and a row of trees and bushes.
A large building with a arched entrance stands behind a road intersection with traffic lights.
A road with trees and bushes on both sides, a speed limit sign on the right, and a cloudy sky above.

A photograph taken from a vehicle on a multi-lane road with a metal barrier to the left and other vehicles in front. The road has white markings and there are trees and buildings in the background under a cloudy sky.
A paved path runs alongside a body of water, lined with grass and trees on one side and a dense hedge on the other.

A suburban street with trees lining both sides, houses behind fences and gardens on the left, and a row of parked cars on the right. The road is tarmac with white markings. A grass verge separates the road from the pavement on the left.
A suburban street with a row of houses on either side, a few cars parked along the road, and trees lining the sidewalk under a cloudy sky.
A street scene with parked cars along the side of a road, a wooden fence separating the road from a grassy area with bare trees, and a cloudy sky above.
A woman in a green leather jacket and a man in a black leather jacket are walking down a street with a market in the background.
A residential street with cars parked along both sides, lined with trees and brick buildings under a blue sky with clouds.

The photograph shows a road with a grassy hill on one side, a fence on top of the hill, and a cloudy sky. The road is empty and has a guardrail along the side closest to the hill. There are trees and greenery on the right side of the hill.
A paved courtyard with a large potted tree and a building with glass windows and doors.
A person wearing a yellow safety jacket stands beside a green metal door on a sidewalk made of large gray tiles, adjacent to a red brick wall with a brown gate.
A street scene with cars driving on a road flanked by residential buildings and trees, under a cloudy sky.
A multi-lane road with cars and a truck traveling on it, lined with streetlights, trees, and houses on the left side under a cloudy sky.
The image shows a street with a row of shops on the left and right, several cars driving on the road, and a sidewalk with a few pedestrians.
a city street with several vehicles and tall buildings on either side
A multi-lane highway with cars driving in both directions, surrounded by brick walls and underpasses, with a bridge and streetlights visible in the background.
A city street with multiple buildings and lit-up cars driving on the road.
The image shows a street with parked cars on the right side and a few cars driving on the road, with buildings and trees on both sides.
A city street with buildings, trees, and vehicles on a road marked with taxi lanes and other traffic markings.
a green field enclosed by a fence with trees in the background and a clear blue sky above
A paved path runs along the edge of a body of water, surrounded by trees and greenery.
A paved path curves through a grassy area with trees on one side and a field on the other under a blue sky with white clouds.
The scene shows a gravel path curving through a grassy area with trees on the right and a field on the left under a blue sky with white clouds.
The image shows a large room with white walls and a high ceiling, featuring several people looking at artwork and a display case.
The image shows a street with brick buildings and hanging flower baskets on either side with a few people walking on the sidewalk and a silver car parked on the left.
The image shows a paved path with people riding bicycles in a park-like setting with trees and grass.
A tree-lined paved path with a grassy verge and a low wall on one side, with a person walking in the distance.
